zh.lifeSummary: Burga Berga Langton是Sir William of Henllys Llangenydd and Gower Langton的女兒，於大約1290年出生。她和Robert Penrice II至少有1個兒子。她去世於1344年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾蕾托 米森登享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Burga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘inaccessible’, an epithet of the wife of Shiva, because of her propensity for prolonged meditation. Durga represents her terrifying form, reflecting her anger when disturbed.

nameMeanings.name: Berga
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Burga Berga Langton was born about 1290 as the daughter of Sir William of Henllys Llangenydd and Gower Langton. She had at least 1 son with Robert Penrice II. She died in 1344, in Little Missenden, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

ja.lifeSummary: Burga Berga Langtonは約1290年にSir William of Henllys Llangenydd and Gower Langtonの娘として生まれた。彼女はRobert Penrice IIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1344年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリットル ミセンデンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Burga Berga Langton(은)는 대략 1290년 Sir William of Henllys Llangenydd and Gower Langton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Robert Penrice II(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 리틀 미센든에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.
